SEV-SNP attestation verification (WASM demo)

Loads four inputs (a binary attestation report plus the ARK, ASK, and VCEK certificates in PEM form), calls verify_attestation_async from the WASM bindings, and renders the verified report fields. The optional bundle splitter calls split_certificate_bundle to populate ASK and ARK from a PEM bundle.

Attestation report (binary, 1184 bytes)
VCEK (PEM)
Optional ASK/ARK bundle splitter (PEM)

Paste or upload a PEM bundle containing the ASK certificate followed by the ARK certificate.

ASK (PEM)
ARK (PEM)
